sections.heading: 🎤 Introduction
paragraphs: [Opening hook that draws listeners into the conversation and connects them to the topic.]
[Introduction of the guest by name with a brief, compelling description of who they are and what they do. Mention website if provided.]
[Brief mention of any product, service, or event if applicable. Omit if none.]
[Natural transition that invites the guest into the conversation and leads into the icebreaker questions.]

questions.question: What is your favorite Bible verse, and why does it speak to you personally?
questions.followup: Has that verse carried a different meaning for you in different seasons of life?

questions.question: [Faith question exploring the guest's testimony or relationship with Christ]
[Faith question exploring spiritual growth or biblical perspective on the episode topic]
[Faith question moving toward broader application and insight]
[Question allowing the guest to describe their offering in their own words]
[Question about why this offering matters to listeners]

sections.heading: 📣 Listener Call-to-Action
paragraphs: [2-3 sentences of ready-to-read promotional copy in Jason's voice directing listeners to the guest's product, service, or event. Include website URL, event date, or offer details as applicable.]

sections.heading: 🙏 Conclusion
paragraphs: [Warm, genuine thanks to the guest that references something specific from their story or the conversation.]
[One sentence summarizing what listeners heard or learned from this episode.]
[Direction to the guest's website and social media.]
[Brief final mention of any product, service, or event if applicable. Omit if none.]
[Encouraging send-off for both guest and listeners that feels natural for a podcast ending.]
